headline: Is National Beverage Corp. (FIZZ) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is FIZZ a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on National Beverage Corp. on Jordan’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on FIZZ. National Beverage Corp.’s share was trading at $32.93 as of April 21st. FIZZ’s trailing and forward P/E were 16.93 and 16.42, respectively according to Yahoo Finance.
